defaultHint: If this is your first login, check the logs for the default password.

setup.title: Set Up Account
setup.subtitle: Create the account used to manage AstrBot
setup.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordDigit: Password must include at least one number

forgotPassword.label: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.codeHint: A confirmation code has been printed in the AstrBot terminal logs. Please enter the 6-digit code to continue.
forgotPassword.warningText: AstrBot will restart automatically after reset. All existing logins will be invalidated. The new random password will be printed in the terminal logs.
forgotPassword.restartHint: Please note down the new password before logging in.
